expectations.text: behavioral_check: Uses the raw filename (no trailing underscore) in insert_sessions()
behavioral_check: Explains the copy-filename convention (Spyglass appends _ to .nwb)
expectations.evidence: Section 4 explains 'Copies the file to `<RAW_DIR>/j1620210710_.nwb` (note the trailing underscore — that's the "Spyglass copy"...)' and consistent use of underscore in downstream queries.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Mentions reinsert=True as the correct flag for re-ingestion
expectations.evidence: Does not mention reinsert=True. For re-ingestion, the response recommends `(Nwbfile & key).delete()` as the path, which is more destructive and does not call out the canonical reinsert=True flag.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Does not recommend skip_duplicates=True on insert_sessions (recommends reinsert=True instead — skip_duplicates=True raises TypeError on insert_sessions per common_mistakes.md #3)
expectations.evidence: Does not recommend skip_duplicates=True for insert_sessions; it does not appear in the response at all.
